pikslots

The all-in-one appointment booking platform
built for modern service businesses

SaaS Platform Multi-Tenant MVP Ready

Investor Pitch Deck  ·  May 2026

The Problem

Service businesses are drowning in
scheduling chaos

📞

Manual Booking Overload

Staff spend hours on phone/email taking appointments — time that should go to customers.

📭

No-Shows & Last-Minute Cancellations

Without automated reminders and policies, ~20% of booked slots go unused — direct revenue loss.

🧩

Fragmented, Expensive Tools

Businesses juggle 3–5 separate tools for booking, payments, CRM, and notifications — at $50–$200/mo each.

$483 billion global professional services market — still heavily reliant on phone calls and manual scheduling in 2026.

The Solution

One platform.
Infinite bookings.

  • Custom branded booking page at yourbusiness.pikslots.com
  • Smart scheduling with configurable lead time, cancellation policies & reminders
  • Team calendar management with role-based access
  • Built-in payment collection before or after appointments
  • Real-time notifications (email/SMS) for staff & customers
  • Full white-label customization — colors, logos, themes
No Coding Required Up in Minutes Works on Any Device
 pikslots.com
Key Features

Everything a service business needs

📅

Smart Booking Engine

Configurable availability, lead times, buffer periods, and multi-service booking in one flow.

👥

Team Management

Invite staff, assign roles (Admin/Enhanced/Standard), set per-member schedules and notification preferences.

🎨

Brand Customization

Custom logo, banner, colors, button shapes, light/dark themes — your brand, your booking page.

💳

Integrated Payments

Collect deposits or full payment at booking. Built-in payment history and reporting.

🔔

Smart Notifications

Automated email reminders to customers and staff. Configurable timing, templates, and channels.

📊

Analytics Dashboard

Revenue tracking, customer growth, booking trends, and performance metrics at a glance.

Market Opportunity

A massive, underserved market

$483B
TAM — Global Professional Services Market
$4.6B
SAM — Online Booking Software Market (2026)
$460M
SOM — Realistic 3-Year Addressable Share

Target Verticals

  • Salons & Beauty Studios (2.1M+ in US alone)
  • Health & Wellness Practitioners
  • Fitness Studios & Personal Trainers
  • Medical & Dental Clinics
  • Legal & Financial Advisors
  • Education & Tutoring Centers

Why Now?

  • Post-pandemic digital transformation in SMBs
  • Customers expect online self-service booking
  • Existing tools (Calendly, Acuity) lack multi-tenant & white-label
  • AI-driven scheduling is the next frontier
  • Growing gig economy & freelance service providers
Revenue Model

Subscription SaaS with transaction upside

Free
$0 / mo
1 user · 50 bookings/mo · Pikslots branding
Starter
$29 / mo
3 users · Unlimited bookings · Remove branding
Pro
$79 / mo
10 users · Custom domain · Payments · Analytics
Enterprise
Custom
Unlimited · White-label · API access · SLA
2.5%
Transaction fee on payments processed through platform
14-day
Free trial on all paid plans — no credit card required
Annual
20% discount on annual billing — improves cash flow & retention
MVP Roadmap

From launch to scale

Q3 2026

Core Booking Platform MVP

Business registration, custom booking pages, team management, appointment scheduling, email notifications

Q4 2026

Payments & Analytics

Stripe integration, deposit/full-payment flows, dashboard analytics, SMS reminders, customer portal

Q1 2027

Integrations & Growth

Google Calendar sync, Zapier/webhooks, public API, review management, affiliate program launch

Q2 2027

Enterprise & White-Label

Custom domain support, full white-label reseller program, multi-location businesses, advanced reporting

Current Status

Completed
  • Full-stack monorepo architecture (NestJS + SvelteKit)
  • Multi-tenant business registration & auth
  • JWT auth with role-based access control (6 roles)
  • Brand customization UI with live preview
  • Dashboard with analytics charts
  • Settings suite (brand, notifications, team, booking)
  • BullMQ job queue for background tasks
In Progress
  • Customer-facing booking page
  • Real-time availability calendar
  • Payment integration
Technology

Enterprise-grade, scalable from day one

⚡ SvelteKit 5
🔷 NestJS
🐘 PostgreSQL
🔴 Redis + BullMQ
📦 Nx Monorepo
🐋 Docker
🔒 JWT Auth
✅ TypeScript
⚡ Tailwind CSS v4
🔍 Zod Validation

Clean Architecture

Domain layer fully isolated from frameworks. Repository pattern, use-case classes, and domain events for maintainability at scale.

Built for Multi-Tenancy

Every business gets its own slug, isolated data, and customizable experience from day one. Scales horizontally without redesign.

Developer-First

Full TypeScript across frontend, backend, and shared contracts. Nx workspace enables independent deployments and fast CI/CD.
